name: Gold & Coin Jax
description_short: JM Bullion is an online precious metals dealer offering gold, silver, platinum, and palladium bullion, coins, and collectibles with live spot pricing and IRA-eligible options.
description_long:
JM Bullion operates as a national online precious metals retailer with a local Jacksonville presence featured on their directory of coin dealers. The company provides access to bullion markets through a comprehensive e-commerce platform rather than a traditional brick-and-mortar pawn shop location. Their service model focuses on retail sales of investment-grade and collectible precious metals to consumers nationwide.

The company offers an extensive catalog including gold and silver bars in multiple weights (from grams to kilos), numismatic coins from various mints and countries, platinum and palladium products, and rare coin collections. They provide live spot price updates for gold, silver, platinum, palladium, and copper, along with price charts and market news. Additional services include IRA-eligible precious metals, secure home storage solutions, custom engraving, a buyback program ("Sell to Us"), price alerts, and trading card loans. They offer free shipping on orders over $499 and maintain customer service hours Monday-Friday 8-6 CST.

JM Bullion distinguishes itself through comprehensive product depth, real-time precious metals pricing transparency, and educational resources including investing guides and market analysis tools. The company maintains NGC and PCGS authorization (based on partner dealer information) and provides both collectible and investment-grade options. Their platform includes IRA-specific bullion selections and secure storage partnerships through premium safes and Pelican cases.

As an online-only retailer listed in a local Jacksonville dealer directory, JM Bullion serves primarily remote customers rather than walk-in clientele. While they offer buyback services, their primary function is retail sales rather than collateral-based lending typical of traditional pawn operations. Prospective buyers should note that precious metals purchases carry investment risk, require secure storage consideration, and may have varying tax implications by state.
pros: Live spot price updates for gold, silver, platinum, palladium, and copper with real-time market data
Extensive product catalog including bars, coins, rounds, and rare collectibles from multiple mints and countries
IRA-eligible precious metals options for retirement investment accounts
Secure storage solutions including premium safes and Pelican micro cases
Buyback program allowing customers to sell precious metals back to the company
Educational resources including market news, investing guides, and price charts
cons: Online-only operation with no physical retail location for in-person transactions or immediate fulfillment
Precious metals prices fluctuate daily, creating investment risk for buyers
Minimum $499 order threshold required to qualify for free shipping
Limited information provided about buyback pricing terms or procedures on the public website
Sales tax treatment varies by state, requiring research specific to buyer's location
best_for: Remote investors seeking to purchase bullion and collectible coins online
IRA account holders looking to diversify with precious metals
Collectors of numismatic coins and rare metal products
Buyers seeking real-time spot price transparency and market information
diagnosis: JM Bullion is best suited for remote precious metals investors and collectors seeking online access to bullion, coins, and numismatic products with transparent spot pricing and IRA options. The primary caveat is that this is an investment product with daily price volatility and no physical storefront presence, requiring buyers to accept market risk and arrange secure storage separately.
services: Gold bullion bars in multiple weights (gram, 1oz, 10oz, kilo)
Silver bullion bars and rounds (1oz through 100oz)
US Mint gold and silver coins including American Eagles and Buffalos
International coin offerings (Canadian Maple Leafs, British Britannias, Australian Kangaroos, South African Krugerrands, Austrian Philharmonics)
Platinum and palladium bars and coins
Secure storage solutions (premium safes, Pelican cases)
